commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can cover the omitted live-session scope fields and add the missing regression; maintainer compatibility acceptance still remains before merge.; Needs attention: The token-binding direction is security-positive, but the omitted live-session fingerprint fields leave a concrete stale-scope security concern.; Review finding: [P1] Include every scoped token field in the live fingerprint... commands.review_summary:
The PR moves MCP loopback scope from mutable request headers/env values into server-issued scoped bearer tokens and updates gateway, CLI runner, live-probe, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +107, Tests +130. Total +237 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main authenticates the bearer token and then reads MCP loopback scope from request headers; the PR body also supplies after-fix runtime logs for the central spoofed-header path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can cover the omitted live-session scope fields and add the missing regression; maintainer compatibility acceptance still remains before merge.
